name: Fall Into Me - The British Billionaire

reviews.review_description: They both fell through the world.
Save yourself the hassle and don't download

The streaming episodes worked with no problem but i couldn't download the vr experiences.  It would get to 47% then go back to 33% and repeat. I gave up after the 4th time. And it happened on all the experiences,  not just one.  I even checked to make sure phone had space and wifi signal was strong. It just wouldn't work.
The additional data to download in order to actually use this app as indicated fails to download. Also the theatrical series videos will not play.
This is like bad porn and you are the girl! Two stars and not 0 because I am a man and I consider that I might be influenced by that
Interesting concept but let down by having to wait for large downloads whilst wearing the VR.
The experience would not play after several attempts ....so very frustrating I guess I'll uninstall ��

I've watched the series and I love it despite others opinions about the lead actress. I think she was great and the Elmendorf with negative reviews are seriously jealous, it's sad. All of the actors have done a wonderful job! My only complaint is with the 360 episodes. I can't download even the first episode. My WiFi connection is good and I have the space available on my Samsung Galaxy s7 edge. I'm trying to find an alternative, please help by posting a resolution if you have one.
It forces you to download all of the content from INSIDE VR. This is a major drawback. I wasnt even able to play it because of this fact. It really is beyond me why developers keep doing this...
You get to watch all the episodes to this series for free. Love it
I am not sure if its my Occulus Go of me but it never downloaded
Just wont let me see anything
Doesn't work. Downloads fine but when it comes to watching the series or using the app it says it needs to download audio,  then it doesn't work and takes me back to the main menu
